title: Portfolio RAG Agent
html: A LangGraph ReAct agent powering the AI chat on this portfolio. Custom LangChain BaseRetriever queries Supabase pgvector (Gemini Embedding 2, 3072-dim) for cosine similarity search. Session memory via Cloudflare KV, LangSmith tracing.

title: Expenses Tracker (AI Assistant)
html: AI agent with function calling (OpenRouter/OpenAI SDK) deployed on Supabase Deno Edge Functions. Supports multimodal input via receipt OCR, tool-dispatched CRUD operations, and a human-in-the-loop confirmation flow before any write commits to the database.

title: Crypthub Trader
html: CryptHub is a powerful web application offering live chart data and comprehensive tools for tracking cryptocurrency prices, trends, and peer-to-peer trading, empowering users to make informed investment decisions in the dynamic world of cryptocurrencies.
